title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Paytm

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Paytm
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Paytm in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Paytm:
Paytm is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm!
